name: CobbleFurnies
description: CobbleFurnies is here to bring your creations to life with beautifully crafted, Cobblemon-inspired furniture that blends seamlessly into your Minecraft world!
description_pt_br: CobbleFurnies traz suas criações à vida com móveis lindamente elaborados com temática Cobblemon que se integram perfeitamente ao seu mundo Minecraft!
